Product Specifications:

Basic information

Product Type:Single Box Product

Product Name:White Nightstand with Drawer, Modern Bedside Table with Wavy Apron Design, Compact End Table for Bedroom Living Room, Small Side Table with Storage

Origin:China

Product Style:Modern

Number of drawers:1 Drawer

Features:Drawers

Applicable scenarios:Bedroom

Wood tones:White

Product size

Assembly Length (inches):15.75

Assembly Width (inches):15.75

Assembly Height (inches):19.69

Length (inches):22.05

Product features:

  • Unique Wavy Drawer DesignFeatures a distinctive wavy drawer front that adds a soft, playful touch to your space. The sculpted silhouette stands out while still blending naturally with modern and Nordic-style interiors.
  • Compact Size for Small SpacesMeasuring 15.75" W × 15.75" D × 16.69" H, this nightstand is ideal for apartments, bedrooms, dorm rooms, or cozy corners where space is limited but style still matters.
  • Smooth & Durable MDF ConstructionCrafted from high-quality MDF, the table offers a smooth surface, stable structure, and reliable everyday use. Easy to clean and designed to hold daily essentials like books, glasses, and décor.
  • Practical Storage with DrawerThe single drawer provides convenient hidden storage for personal items, keeping your bedside or living area neat and uncluttered while maintaining a clean, minimal look.
  • Versatile Bedside or Side TablePerfect as a nightstand, end table, or accent table. Its small footprint and charming design make it a flexible piece for bedrooms, living rooms, or reading nooks.
